title: PvP
description: The best modpack for crystal, sword and axe PvP. Having a huge focus on game performance.
body:
## The best mods for PvP while getting the highest performance possible.
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a717301a9f71774b5cefec4eea54390da0d252a.webp)

### Screenshot using [PvP Scroutopia](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-)
## Notes
This modpack includes ViaFabricPlus, which allows you to join Minecraft Java servers to most versions. For that reason, I am not considering updating the modpack beyond 1.21.1, another reason being that some mods are not available in the newest versions.
